description: Baseline M3D-C1 diagnostic bundle placeholder. This file defines the required artifacts for replacing proxy smoke diagnostics with real M3D-C1 output. Do not treat this as validation evidence until the listed CSV/log files are exported from an actual M3D-C1 run.
intended_use: Reference baseline for comparing a later TCT-modified case against an unmodified M3D-C1-compatible run.

primary_metric.name: linear_mode_growth_rate
primary_metric.method: Fit slope of log(amplitude) versus time over the linear growth window.

notes: This baseline should be generated from the same equilibrium, mesh, solver settings, and timestep policy used by the TCT-modified case, except with the TCT-inspired modification disabled.
Commit real diagnostics separately from this placeholder so reviewers can distinguish schema setup from validation evidence.
